title: Persicaria sphaerocephala
taxonomy: Persicaria sphaerocephala is classified within the family Polygonaceae, a group of plants commonly known as buckwheat or smartweed family. This family is a part of the order Polygonales, which is a small order within the class Magnoliopsida. The class Magnoliopsida is a subclass of the larger group known as the flowering plants, or angiosperms. Persicaria sphaerocephala is further classified at the kingdom level as Plantae, which includes all plant species.
